code:
sequenceDiagram %% Component Interaction - User browsing/searching journey %% Based on actual user flow through the application participant User as 👤 User participant Browser as 🌐 Browser participant NextJS as ⚛️ Next.js App participant ArtworkAPI as 🎨 Artwork API participant PersonAPI as 👥 Person API participant RAGAPI as 🧠 RAG API participant SolrClient as 🔍 Solr Client participant RAGService as 🔄 RAG Service participant ES as 🔍 Elasticsearch participant OpenAI as 🤖 OpenAI participant Mongo as 🍃 MongoDB Note over User, Mongo: User Journey: Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat %% 1. Homepage Load User->>Browser: Navigate to homepage Browser->>NextJS: GET /de (HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) NextJS->>NextJS: Load homepage component NextJS-->>Browser: Homepage with hero section Browser-->>User: Display homepage %% 2. Search Artworks User->>Browser: Enter search query "impressionist" Browser->>NextJS: Search form submission NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&page=1&pageSize=12 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(HealthTech_EMR_Sync}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Build Solr query parameters SolrClient->>SolrClient: Execute search against collection.kunsthaus.ch SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: SolrSearchResponse with artworks + facets ArtworkAPI->>ArtworkAPI: Transform Solr results to Artwork models ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response with artworks + pagination NextJS->>NextJS: Update artwork grid component NextJS-->>Browser: Render search results Browser-->>User: Display 12 impressionist artworks %% 3. Filter Results User->>Browser: Apply category filter "Painting" Browser->>NextJS: Update search parameters NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?q=impressionist&categories=Painting ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(HealthTech_EMR_Sync]}) SolrClient->>SolrClient: Add category filter to query SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Filtered results ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Filtered artworks NextJS-->>Browser: Updated results Browser-->>User: Show only paintings %% 4. View Artwork Detail User->>Browser: Click on artwork "Sunflowers" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/artworks/123 NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks/123 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: getArtworkById(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Artwork details ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Complete artwork data NextJS->>NextJS: Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer NextJS-->>Browser: Artwork detail page Browser-->>User: Show artwork details + high-res image %% 5. View Related Artist User->>Browser: Click on artist "Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to /de/persons/456 NextJS->>PersonAPI: GET /api/de/persons/456 PersonAPI->>SolrClient: getArtistById(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) SolrClient-->>PersonAPI: Person details PersonAPI-->>NextJS: Person data NextJS->>NextJS: Load person detail page NextJS-->>Browser: Person biography + artworks Browser-->>User: Show Van Gogh's biography + works %% 6. Ask RAG Question User->>Browser: Type question "What technique did Van Gogh use?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit RAG query NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(HealthTech_PatientRecords}}) Note over RAGService: RAG Processing RAGService->>RAGService: Enhance query + detect language RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate embedding OpenAI-->>RAGService: Embedding vector par Vector Search RAGService->>ES: KNN search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Vector results and Lexical Search RAGService->>ES: BM25 search with artwork context ES-->>RAGService: Lexical results end RAGService->>RAGService: Merge results + select context RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context OpenAI-->>RAGService: Answer with citations RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult with citations RAGAPI-->>NextJS: JSON response NextJS->>NextJS: Update chat interface NextJS-->>Browser: Display answer with citations Browser-->>User: "Van Gogh verwendete Ölmalerei-Technik... [HealthTech_PatientRecords] [HealthTech_EMR_Sync]" %% 7. Follow-up Question User->>Browser: Ask follow-up "When was it painted?" Browser->>NextJS: Submit follow-up NextJS->>RAGAPI: POST /api/de/rag/answer/artwork/123
{HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]} RAGAPI->>RAGService: answerRag(HealthTech_EMR_Sync]}) RAGService->>RAGService: Process with conversation history RAGService->>OpenAI: Generate answer with context + history OpenAI-->>RAGService: Contextual answer RAGService-->>RAGAPI: AnswerResult RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Follow-up answer NextJS-->>Browser: Display contextual answer Browser-->>User: "Das Gemälde wurde 1888 gemalt... [HealthTech_PatientRecords]" %% 8. Browse Related Artworks User->>Browser: Click "View all works by Van Gogh" Browser->>NextJS: Navigate to artist's works NextJS->>ArtworkAPI: GET /api/de/artworks?person=456&page=1 ArtworkAPI->>SolrClient: searchArtworks(HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}) SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: All Van Gogh artworks ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: Artwork list NextJS-->>Browser: Grid of Van Gogh's works Browser-->>User: Show all Van Gogh artworks %% Error Handling alt Search Error SolrClient-->>ArtworkAPI: Error response ArtworkAPI-->>NextJS: 500 Error NextJS-->>Browser: Error message Browser-->>User: "Search temporarily unavailable" end alt RAG Error RAGService-->>RAGAPI: No context found RAGAPI-->>NextJS: Empty response NextJS-->>Browser: "No information available" Browser-->>User: "Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen." end

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为美术馆的数字化平台绘制一个完整的用户旅程时序图，涵盖从搜索艺术品到使用RAG对话问答的全流程。核心参与者包括用户、浏览器、Next.js前端，以及后端的Artwork API、Person API和RAG API三大服务。
明白。关于搜索部分，我看到Artwork API需要调用Solr Client，这个Solr Client是直接查询Solr集群吗？另外RAG部分涉及Elasticsearch和OpenAI，这些中间层的调用关系需要展开到什么程度？
Solr Client需要完整展示，因为它内部有构建查询参数、执行搜索的逻辑。RAG链路要细化到RAG Service层，展示它如何并行发起向量搜索和BM25词法搜索，最后合并结果再调用OpenAI生成答案。MongoDB作为会话存储也需要出现。
好的，我先画出主干结构：用户通过浏览器访问Next.js应用，搜索时Artwork API调用Solr Client查询collection.kunsthaus.ch索引，返回带分面的结果。RAG流程中RAG API调用RAG Service，后者并行向Elasticsearch发起KNN向量搜索和BM25搜索，合并后请求OpenAI生成带引用的回答。
结构正确。补充一个细节：当用户查看艺术品详情后，点击艺术家名称查看相关作品时，需要经过Person API查询艺术家信息，这个分支别忘了。另外整个旅程顶部加一个注释框，标注'Search → Browse → Detail → Related → Chat'五个阶段。
已添加PersonAPI分支和顶部注释。现在检查RAG的追问环节：用户问'What technique did Van Gogh use?'后追问'When was it painted?'，这里需要体现RAG Service使用conversation history来保持上下文连续性，对吗？
对的，追问时要明确标注RAG Service'Process with conversation history'的步骤。还有，所有API返回给前端的数据都要包含分页信息，比如搜索印象派作品时首次返回12条结果。
我注意到Solr Client的调用参数标注需要统一。搜索时用的是HealthTech_EMR_Sync，但详情查询用的是HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault，这两个标识代表不同的查询模式还是数据安全级别？
这是数据访问策略的区分：HealthTech_EMR_Sync用于列表搜索和过滤，HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault用于单条详情的敏感数据获取，HealthTech_PatientRecords用于RAG的向量检索上下文。追问时因为复用会话，所以又切回HealthTech_EMR_Sync。
参数标注已修正。现在添加错误处理分支：Solr搜索失败时返回500错误，RAG无上下文时返回'No information available'。这两个alt分支放在主流程下方。
错误处理可以，但RAG的错误分支要更具体：当RAG Service返回'No context found'时，RAG API给前端空响应，Next.js渲染'Ich finde dazu keine ausreichenden Informationen'的德语提示。这是多语言场景。
已更新德语错误提示。检查过滤环节：用户应用'Painting'类别过滤时，Solr Client需要'Add category filter to query'的内部处理步骤，这个自调用消息我加在Solr Client内部。
这里有个问题——过滤请求的参数标注我写成了HealthTech_EMR_Sync]}，多了一个右括号，应该是HealthTech_EMR_Sync]。另外详情页查询的HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault漏掉了右括号，需要统一修正。

收到，修正括号错误：过滤环节使用HealthTech_EMR_Sync]，详情查询使用HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault}。同时检查RAG API的两个端点：首次问答是/answer/artwork/123，追问是/answer/artwork/123，但内部调用的标识不同，分别是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer和HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，对吗？
端点路径确认，但标注的括号也有问题：HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}}多了一个右花括号，应该是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer}；HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine]应该是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine}。这些是追踪标识的格式错误。
所有括号格式已修正。最后验证完整流程：用户从首页进入→搜索'impressionist'→过滤'Painting'→查看'Sunflowers'详情→点击Van Gogh查看艺术家→发起RAG问答→追问创作时间→浏览该艺术家全部作品。每个环节的消息流向和参与者交互都已对应。
流程完整。最后确认IIIF viewer的集成：在查看'Sunflowers'详情时，Next.js需要'Load artwork detail page + IIIF viewer'这个步骤，确保高分辨率图像展示被明确标注。
IIIF viewer步骤已添加。最终检查：所有并行搜索用par/end块包裹，注释框覆盖完整旅程，错误处理分支独立，参与者图标使用emoji区分（👤用户、🌐浏览器、⚛️ Next.js、🎨 Artwork API等）。图表可以定稿。
